title: Tropical Fever
description: A young patient with high fever and joint pain after traveling.

title: Cyclical Chills
description: Patient presents with recurring fever and intense shivering.

title: Contaminated Water
description: Sustained fever and abdominal pain after eating street food.

title: Shortness of Breath
description: Elderly patient with productive cough and chest pain.

title: Excessive Thirst
description: Middle-aged patient reporting polyuria and weight loss.

title: Silent Killer
description: Routine checkup reveals dangerously high blood pressure.

title: Persistent Cough
description: Chronic cough with weight loss and night sweats.

title: Loss of Smell
description: Acute respiratory symptoms with anosmia.

title: Pale and Tired
description: Young female with extreme fatigue and brittle nails.

title: Wheezing Child
description: Child with difficulty breathing during physical activity.

title: Sudden Vomiting
description: Acute onset of diarrhea and vomiting after a party.

title: Burning Sensation
description: Frequent urination with pain and cloudy urine.

title: Right Lower Pain
description: Acute abdominal pain migrating to the right lower quadrant.

title: Stiff Neck
description: High fever, headache, and inability to flex the neck.

title: Yellow Eyes
description: Jaundice and dark urine in a school-aged child.

title: Itchy Rash
description: Widespread vesicular rash and low-grade fever.

title: Koplik Spots
description: Fever, cough, and characteristic spots inside the mouth.

title: Pulsating Headache
description: Unilateral headache with light sensitivity and aura.

title: Burning Stomach
description: Epigastric pain relieved by eating.

title: Feeling Cold
description: Weight gain, constipation, and cold intolerance.

title: Racing Heart
description: Weight loss, tremors, and heat intolerance.

title: Morning Stiffness
description: Joint pain and stiffness that improves with movement.

title: Flank Pain
description: Excruciating pain radiating to the groin.

title: Smoker's Cough
description: Productive cough for several months in a smoker.

title: Rice Water Stool
description: Profuse watery diarrhea leading to rapid dehydration.

title: Grey Membrane
description: Sore throat with a thick grey coating in the throat.

title: Lockjaw
description: Muscle spasms and difficulty opening the mouth after a cut.

title: Fear of Water
description: Hydrophobia and agitation after a dog bite.

title: Bleeding Gums
description: Weakness and gum bleeding in a patient with poor diet.

title: Bowed Legs
description: Bone pain and skeletal deformities in a young child.

title: Easy Bruising
description: Frequent infections, fatigue, and unexplained bruising.

title: Swollen Nodes
description: Painless swelling of lymph nodes in the neck.

title: Changing Mole
description: A skin lesion that has changed shape and color.

title: Tunnel Vision
description: Gradual loss of peripheral vision and eye pain.

title: Cloudy Vision
description: Progressive blurring of vision and glare sensitivity.

title: Ear Ache
description: Severe ear pain and muffled hearing in a toddler.

title: Facial Pressure
description: Pain over the sinuses and nasal congestion.

title: Difficulty Swallowing
description: Red, swollen tonsils and sore throat.

title: Silvery Scales
description: Red patches of skin covered with thick silvery scales.

title: Red and Itchy
description: Dry, itchy skin patches that often weep.

title: Night Itch
description: Intense itching, especially at night, with small burrows.

title: Bull's Eye Rash
description: Characteristic rash after a tick bite in the woods.

title: Painless Sore
description: A single, painless sore on the genitals.

title: Discharge
description: Painful urination and abnormal discharge.

title: Opportunistic Infection
description: Recurrent infections and persistent weight loss.

title: Forgetting Names
description: Progressive memory loss and confusion in an elderly patient.

title: Resting Tremor
description: Shaking hands and slow movement (bradykinesia).

title: Seizures
description: Recurrent episodes of involuntary movements.

title: Numbness
description: Episodes of vision loss and limb weakness.

title: Facial Droop
description: Sudden weakness on one side of the body and slurred speech.
